prose:
**Nitrobenzene Fukui reactivity descriptors** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, no density fitting) in PySCF (via chemkit), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz`, single-point (no optimization).
SCF converged successfully; Mulliken partial-charge scheme. No warnings reported.
The most electrophilic site is atom 4 (C) with Fukui f⁺ = 0.49641779; the most nucleophilic site is atom 5 (C) with Fukui f⁻ = 0.1072882.

Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 \
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp9xckg4r7/live.json
```
